query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(DISTINCT c.id) AS internal_contact_count,
  COUNT(DISTINCT cp.projectId) AS projects_contaminated,
  GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT c.company ORDER BY c.company SEPARATOR ' | ') AS companies
FROM contacts c
JOIN contactProjects cp ON cp.contactId = c.id
WHERE c.contactTrustTier = 'send_ready'
  AND (c.company LIKE '%atlascopco%' OR c.company LIKE '%atlas copco%' OR c.email LIKE '%@atlascopco.com%');
